gate.title: You stand at the threshold.
gate.text: Beyond this door lies part of my technical world. The rest is only shared with those bold enough to knock.

hero.eyebrow: Engineer · Creator · Quiet voice of digital
hero.description: I build intelligent systems. I only show a fraction of what I know — the rest is exchanged in confidence.
hero.whisper: « Curiosity is the best key. If you read this far, perhaps you deserve to talk to me. »

mystery.band: I don't sell mystery for show — I protect what matters. Every project starts with one question: what are you really trying to solve?

vault.title: Locked knowledge
vault.lead: Click a card to decrypt. Some skills only yield to effort.

about.title: What I let you see
about.lead: The rest unfolds in conversation — as it should.
about.subtitle: Digital architect, trainer, discreet strategist
about.caption: Lubumbashi · UPL · IT & AI
about.p1: With deep experience in information technology, I am an expert in software development, artificial intelligence, networking and system administration. Graduate in Computer Systems, Software Engineering and AI at Université Protestante de Lubumbashi (UPL), I design robust applications and intelligent systems that turn technical challenges into concrete solutions.
about.p2: Passionate about innovation and digital transformation, I have created numerous applications and intelligent systems. Mastering both frontend and backend, I solve complex problems with rigor and creativity. As a professional trainer in computing and programming, I share my expertise to elevate the digital skills of the new generation.

t1.text: Edvais transformed our IT infrastructure with remarkable expertise. His professionalism and problem-solving skills are exceptional.
t1.name: Jean Mukendi

t2.text: The AI surveillance system exceeded our expectations. An innovative, reliable solution perfectly tailored to our needs.
